summary: Review an active deal for stage health, win blockers, and proposal readiness before next action.

inputs.name: deal_snapshot
inputs.description: Stage, stakeholders, amount, and close target.

inputs.name: buyer_signals
inputs.description: Known objections, timeline, and engagement status.

inputs.name: proposal_context
inputs.description: Current proposal draft, pricing frame, or requested deliverables.

outputs.name: deal_risk_summary
outputs.description: Stage confidence, blockers, and missing evidence.

outputs.name: next_step_plan
outputs.description: Recommended actions for seller and timeline owner.

outputs.name: proposal_adjustments
outputs.description: Proposal refinements tied to the buyer context.

budget.notes: Bias toward concrete blockers and near-term next steps.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is sales execution support, not contract interpretation or finance approval.
Require stage, buyer status, and objective before proposing actions.
Return risk, next step, and proposal guidance in one consistent review.

steps.action: Review stage evidence, deal hygiene, and forecast confidence.
Recommend stakeholder moves, objection handling, and mutual action planning.
Align proposal scope, value framing, and deliverables to the buyer context.
Merge the findings into a single deal review with owner-specific next steps.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read CRM exports, notes, and proposal drafts.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save the synthesized review when the task requests an artifact.

verification.method: Check that the review cites the current stage and missing proof points.
Check each action has an owner and short timeline.
Check proposal adjustments tie back to stated buyer needs.

success_criteria: The review distinguishes deal evidence from assumptions.
The next-step plan is specific enough for immediate seller follow-up.
Proposal changes clearly reinforce the active deal strategy.

rollback.when: If the review invents buyer facts or mismatches the current stage, roll back to the raw deal snapshot and rerun strategy and proposal steps.
